# Evidence Review Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Evidence Review — <Draft / Claim Set>

## Claims reviewed

| Claim | Evidence found | Rating | Risk | Safer wording / next step |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  | Supported / Partial / Unsupported / Contradicted / Unknown | Low / Medium / High |  |

## High-risk unsupported claims

## Evidence gaps

## Suggested revised wording

## Assumptions
```
